name: CustomerProfile
description: Minimal ODCS schema fixture for JTBD testing
content:
apiVersion: v3.1.0
kind: DataContract
id: customer-profile-schema-001
version: 1.0.0
name: CustomerProfile
schema:
  - name: customer_profile
    physicalName: customer_profile
    description: Customer profile table
    properties:
      - name: customer_id
        logicalType: string
        primaryKey: true
      - name: email
        logicalType: string
        required: true
      - name: created_at
        logicalType: timestamp
